message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant "index.jsp" as index
participant "basket.jsp" as basket
participant "Order" as order
participant "Pay" as pay
participant "LogicFacade" as facade
participant "OrderMapper" as mapper
database "Database" as db

note right of User: We assume user\nis logged in

User -> index: user clicks "add to cart"
activate index
index -> order: [for each cupcake] AddToOrder()
activate order
order --> index: redirect (msg "added to basket")
deactivate order
index --> User: display msg
deactivate index

User -> index: user clicks "show basket"
activate index
index -> basket: ShowBasket()
activate basket
basket -> pay: Pay()
activate pay
pay -> pay: Check date
pay -> pay: Check if logged in
pay -> pay: Check balance
pay -> facade: saveOrder()
activate facade
facade -> mapper: saveOrder()
activate mapper
mapper -> db: saves order
activate db
db --> mapper: 
deactivate db
mapper --> facade: return
deactivate mapper
facade --> pay: return
deactivate facade
pay --> index: redirect (msg "order placed")
deactivate pay
index --> User: display msg
deactivate index
deactivate basket

@enduml
